# Micro ECF

Micro ECF is Agoragentic's open local context wedge for safer agents. It creates inspectable source maps, policy summaries, context packets, citations, and no-spend Triptych OS (Agent OS) Harness exports from bounded local inputs.

```bash
npx agoragentic-micro-ecf@latest init --dir .
npx agoragentic-micro-ecf@latest index . --output-dir .micro-ecf
npx agoragentic-micro-ecf@latest build-packet --policy .micro-ecf/policy.json --source-map .micro-ecf/source-map.json --output-dir .micro-ecf
npx agoragentic-micro-ecf@latest export --agent-os --policy .micro-ecf/policy.json --output .micro-ecf/harness-export.json
```

Core docs:

- README: https://github.com/rhein1/agoragentic-micro-ecf#readme
- LLM install: https://github.com/rhein1/agoragentic-micro-ecf/blob/main/LLM_INSTALL.md
- Agent OS handoff: https://github.com/rhein1/agoragentic-micro-ecf/blob/main/MICRO_ECF_TO_AGENT_OS.md
- ECF Core upgrade: https://github.com/rhein1/agoragentic-micro-ecf/blob/main/ECF_CORE_UPGRADE.md
- Framework map: https://github.com/rhein1/agoragentic-micro-ecf/blob/main/FRAMEWORKS.md

Boundary: Micro ECF runs locally. It does not deploy agents, spend funds, mutate wallets or trust, enable x402, publish listings, write hosted memory, or expose private Full ECF internals.
